item.title: Kubernetes Cluster Roles
item.author: Author
item.description: Namespaced 1 kubectl api-resources --namespaced=true Cluster Scoped 1 kubectl api-resources --namespaced=false Cluster Role Cluster Admin Can View Nodes Can Create Nodes Can Delete Nodes Storage Admin Can View PVs Can Create PVs Can Delete PVCs Cluster Role YAML cluster-admin-role.yaml 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 apiVersion:rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1kind:ClusterRolemetadata:name:cluster-administratorrules:- apiGroups:[""]resources:["nodes"]verbs:["list","get","create","delete"] 1 kubectl create -f cluster-admin-role.
